justification: The diff successfully migrates from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) and updates Maven compiler settings to Java 21, but it doesn't utilize any Java 21-specific idioms (like records, pattern matching, or virtual threads). The migration of test annotations (@Before -> @BeforeEach, @After -> @AfterEach) and assertions (Assert -> Assertions) is correct and clean. The pom.xml changes are coherent, updating dependencies and excluding transitive JUnit 4 dependencies.
